subcodes.first_line: The sparking melody of the celestial salamander of the divine fire brought joy to hearts and exhilaration to the spirit, for it arose from the attractions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نغمه شرربار سمندر نار موقده ربانیه مفرح قلوب بود و منعش روح چه که از انجذابات
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
